title: SACRAMENTO –

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has made a significant investment in preparing for the 2020 Census.",
    "State, regional, and community leaders have been collaborating to come up with a strategy to ensure every Californian is counted.",
    "California will lose significant federal funding for every person undercounted in the census.",
    "Accurate census preparation efforts will be instrumental to achieving a complete count of all California residents.",
    "State leaders have invested $100.3 million toward strategies and activities to ensure an accurate and successful count in California.",
    "Governor Newsom's FY 2019-20 proposed budget includes an additional $54 million to support census outreach efforts.",
    "Funding will be divided for a media campaign to help close gaps in vulnerable and hard-to-count communities."
  ]
}
```
